title: Multiomics profiling and experiments in preclinical models revealed RAD51-IN-1 as a synergistic potentiator of anlotinib sensitivity.
snippet: Anlotinib has demonstrated preliminary efficacy as a first-line maintenance therapy for ovarian cancer. However, clinical responses vary widely. To investigate resistance mechanisms and explore rational combinations, pretreatment tumors from 18 patients in clinical trial NCT04807166 underwent whole-exome and RNA sequencing and stratified into sensitive and....
